doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.macro_equivalence_threshold: Use a generic alias when the food is the same practical food, the prep state matches, and calories are within about 10% or 10 kcal per 100g with no structural macro difference.
do_not_collapse: whole egg vs yolk or white
pickled vs raw when sodium/prep matters

aliases.reason: Brand label does not change strawberry identity.
Store and organic labels do not change raw lime identity.
Bell pepper colors are close enough for generic bell pepper logging.

aliases.alias: lazy acres organic red bell peppers
aliases.reason: Store and organic labels do not change bell pepper identity.
Brand, organic, and baby-leaf labels route to raw arugula.

aliases.alias: knudsen low fat cottage cheese small curd 2 milkfat
aliases.reason: Fat level is preserved at 2% cottage cheese.

aliases.alias: knudsen half and half ultra pasteurized quart
aliases.reason: Brand and package size do not change half-and-half identity.

aliases.reason: Brand-specific plain skyr anchor already exists.

aliases.reason: All-purpose flour variants are close enough for calorie/macro logging; bleached/unbleached is not a structural macro difference.
